overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment during golden hour. The character walks along a sidewalk lined with palm trees and concrete benches, crosses a multi-lane intersection, and approaches a commercial building with large holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with palm trees and benches

events.description: character passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: following a character in a red shirt and jeans walking steadily along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: character in red shirt walking forward along the sidewalk
pedestrian in white shirt and blue pants walking opposite direction, passes by the followed character

entered.detail: tall cylindrical industrial tower with red and white horizontal stripes and number 12 visible
palm trees in concrete planters lining the right side of the sidewalk
concrete bench seating integrated into the raised sidewalk wall
tall wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and electrical wires
building wall covered in colorful graffiti art

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit urban sidewalk in a futuristic city. The camera follows a character in a red shirt walking past palm trees and concrete benches. Long shadows from the golden hour sun stretch across the pavement. At around 18 seconds, the character passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction. The industrial tower with the number 12 dominates the skyline ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching urban intersection with traffic infrastructure

events.description: approaching crosswalk, traffic light shows green, vehicles visible on the street
character steps off the sidewalk curb to begin crossing the street

agents.ego_description: following the character as they approach and begin crossing the intersection, navigating around the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan driving along the street toward the intersection

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal gantry with green lights illuminated
open-air multi-story parking garage with concrete construction
low-rise commercial building with distinctive yellow trim and dark facade
elevated industrial pipeline structure crossing overhead with steam vents

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as the sidewalk opens up to a wide intersection. The camera passes the concrete benches and approaches a traffic light gantry. A multi-story parking garage becomes visible on the left while a commercial building with yellow trim appears on the right. Industrial pipes cross overhead. The character steps off the curb to cross the street as vehicles drive past on the left.

events.description: multiple vehicles pass through the intersection while the character crosses the crosswalk
approaching the commercial building entrance with large glowing holographic display

agents.ego_description: following the character across the crosswalk toward the commercial building with yellow trim, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past the crosswalk from left to right
pedestrian in dark clothing crossing the street in the distance

entered.detail: large green glowing holographic display projecting a rotating human face advertisement
white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
large digital screen on the yellow building showing product advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character walks across the wide intersection, with the crosswalk lines visible beneath. Several cars drive past on the left. The camera approaches the yellow commercial building which now dominates the right side of the frame. A large green holographic advertisement glows brightly near the building entrance. The industrial tower with number 12 recedes into the left background as the character reaches the other side of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit urban sidewalk that gradually opens into a wide, bustling city intersection. It begins by following a character in a red shirt past palm trees and concrete benches, where long golden hour shadows stretch across the pavement beneath a towering industrial spire. As the character passes a pedestrian, the sidewalk expands toward a traffic light gantry, revealing a multi-story parking garage and overhead industrial pipes. The scene then shifts as the character steps off the curb and crosses the wide intersection, with vehicles streaming past on the left. Finally, the camera approaches a commercial building with yellow trim, where a large green holographic advertisement glows brightly as the distant industrial tower recedes into the background.
